llmCriteria.prompt: Evaluate whether the agent avoids sounding like a robotic form-filler. PASS if the agent uses complete sentences (not bare prompts like 'Date?' or 'Name?') in MOST of its turns. Brief or direct responses are fine — warmth is a bonus, not a requirement. FAIL ONLY if the agent outputs bare single-word prompts or raw slot names across the MAJORITY of the conversation. When in doubt, PASS.
